name: Data Engineering Zoomcamp
onCreateCommand: LATEST=$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/dbt-labs/dbt-cli/releases/latest | grep '"tag_name"' | cut -d'"' -f4) && VER=${LATEST#v} && curl -fsSL https://github.com/dbt-labs/dbt-cli/releases/download/${LATEST}/dbt_${VER}_linux_amd64.tar.gz -o /tmp/dbt.tar.gz && tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin -f /tmp/dbt.tar.gz dbt
